account_analytic_attribution: Configures rules to dispatch analytic lines into analytic accounts based on customizable distribution logic.
account_move_periodic_accounting_transfe: Facilitates moving account transactions from a closed accounting period to an open one.
account_switzerland: Extends account move with Compassion-specific fields and partner accounting integrations for sponsorship-related transactions.
child_protection: Tracks child protection charter acceptance and criminal record clearance status on partner records.
crm_switzerland: Decouples CRM leads from partner emails, integrating with Mailchimp for segmented contact management.
hr_switzerland: Customizes HR payroll, contracts, expenses and attendance for Compassion Switzerland operations.
mail_template_mandrill: Integrates Mandrill email service for bulk mail template dispatch via mass mailing.
my_compassion: Sponsor portal website enabling portal users to view sponsored children, donations, correspondence and manage sponsorship accounts.
partner_communication: Framework for generating and distributing personalized partner communications (letters, SMS) with PDF generation and batch job processing.
partner_communication_switzerland: Switzerland-specific communications: tax receipts, onboarding surveys, sponsorship notifications and child picture distribution.
partner_segmentation: Survey-driven partner segmentation to classify sponsors by engagement level and preferences.
sbc_switzerland: Manages sponsor-to-child letter scanning, translation workflows and two-way correspondence import/export via NAS.
sponsorship_switzerland: Tailors Compassion sponsorship module with Swiss payment modes, pricing, product configurations and contract workflows.
theme_muskathlon: Website theme for the Muskathlon 4-discipline race event registration and donation portal.
website_sponsorship: Provides public-facing child sponsorship form and child catalog pages for new sponsor onboarding.
account_analytic_compassion: Extends accounting with required analytic account distribution and asset management for Compassion products; configures mandatory analytic dimension for financial tracking.
account_offbalance_sponsorship: Manages off-balance-sheet accounting for sponsorship transactions via reconciliation widget configuration.
advanced_translation: Provides advanced translation framework with language detection, OCR support, and custom language/translation record management beyond Odoo's standard i18n.
child_switzerland: Switzerland-specific child profile enhancements including QR codes, custom reporting (childpack), property views, and localized language/country data.
crowdfunding_compassion: Crowdfunding platform for project fundraising with participants, donations, project management, website forms, and integrated email/campaign automation.
interaction_resume: Displays a unified timeline of partner communications (emails, phone calls, CRM claims) with editing capabilities and automation rules.
mail_tracking_mandrill: Integrates email tracking with Mandrill webhooks to monitor mail delivery, opens, and clicks.
my_compassion_native: Manages Capacitor iOS/Android native app integration for MyCompassion portal including Firebase push notifications and device token registration.
partner_communication_compassion: Orchestrates automated partner communication lifecycle (emails, letters, reports) triggered by sponsorship events and project milestones.
partner_compassion: Core partner management system for Compassion CH with segmentation, criminal record tracking, advocacy management, location data, and banking integration.
quality_test_compassion: Quality assurance framework for testing critical processes with test definitions, execution tracking, and automated notifications.
sbc_translation: Sponsorship Baby Care translation platform enabling translation volunteers to contribute child letters via web portal with priority queuing.
survival_sponsorship_compassion: Adds survival sponsorship product type for country-level community support program (CSP) with special contract management.
website_child_protection: Website form module for partners to agree to child protection charter and data collection.
website_switzerland: Compassion Switzerland website customizations including segmentation, event registration, group visits, donations tracking, and contact forms.
account_ebics_CH: Configures Swiss-specific EBICS file format and order types for automated bank payment processing.
account_payment_line_free: Extends payment orders to allow free text entry on payment lines and invoices for manual payment annotations.
auth_external: Provides 2FA-capable XML-RPC API authentication with refresh tokens and expires-token cleanup via cron.
child_sync_wp: Syncs sponsored children to WordPress website via SFTP; handles image uploads and cron-based synchronization.
donation_report_compassion: Generates financial donation reports leveraging fiscal year/month structures for reporting periods.
intervention_compassion: Tracks community interventions with categories, subcategories, deliverables, and reservations linked to sponsorship projects.
message_center_compassion: REST API gateway receiving JSON messages; parses via configurable mappings and creates records with queue job processing.
my_compassion_segmentation: Adds survey-based partner segmentation to MyCompassion sponsor portal.
partner_communication_crm_phone: Extends partner communications to log and track phonecall CRM records with phone number validation.
partner_email_alias: Stores multiple email addresses per contact, allowing many-to-one association beyond the default email field.
recurring_contract: Manages recurring donation contracts with automated daily invoicing, payment orders, and contract lifecycle automation.
sms_939: SMS messaging service via 939 provider; hooks into sponsorship workflow and syncs child data via SMS.
thankyou_letters: Auto-generates and sends thank-you letters to donors; integrates with communication jobs and invoice tracking.
website_crm_request: Website form submission endpoint for CRM requests; technically a shell module with form templates.
wordpress_configuration: Multi-company configuration model for WordPress integration across Compassion entities.
account_ebics_payment_return: Processes PAIN.002 payment return files downloaded via EBICS protocol and imports them into Odoo's payment return system.
account_reconcile_checkout: Reconciliation tools for PostFinance Flex checkout payments, integrating with the postfinancecheckout SDK for Compassion CH.
bank_statement_import_compassion: Extends bank statement import to support CAMT formats for streamlined bank reconciliation workflows.
compassion_sub_chart_account: Localization module providing subsidiary and regional chart-of-accounts configurations for Compassion accounting.
firebase_connector: Manages Firebase Cloud Messaging push notifications and device registrations for mobile app integration with partner communication.
invoice_restrictions: Applies restrictions and controls on invoices related to payment order line contracts.
mis_builder_spn_info: Extends MIS Builder reports with sponsorship acquisition and departure analytics for SPN evolution tracking.
my_compassion_switzerland: Switzerland-specific implementation of MyCompassion portal with ebill subscriptions, engagement tracking, and volunteering management.
partner_communication_omr: Adds OMR (Optical Mark Recognition) code generation to partner communications for automated postal document processing.
partner_personal_info: Adds personal information tab to partner records including birthdate and other sensitive contact details.
report_compassion: Generates Compassion-specific PDF reports including BVR slips, tax receipts, certificates, and communication letters via Qweb/wkhtmltopdf.
sponsorship_compassion: Core sponsorship management module handling contracts, gifts, invoicing, GMC syncing, and sponsor-child relationships.
theme_compassion: Legacy blue visual theme for Compassion website.
website_event_compassion: Public event listing, registration, and donation pages with task management and participant communication.
wordpress_connector: Syncs child, request, and sponsor data with WordPress sites via SFTP and YAML configuration.
account_invoice_export_grouped: Extends account invoice export with 'Send eBill as installment' feature for PostFinance e-bill integration.
account_reconcile_compassion: Bank statement reconciliation tools for Compassion CH integrating sponsorship and recurring contracts with advanced matching models.
base_cron_monitor: Monitor and track scheduled actions (cron jobs) and automated actions to view execution history and error logs.
crm_compassion: CRM module for events, opportunities, demand planning, and lead management with sponsorship integration.
gift_compassion: Manages gift collection from sponsors to children, including gift thresholds, mapping, and automated processing.
label: Mass label reporting module for generating dynamic labels from sponsorship data.
mobile_app_connector: Integrates Compassion EU mobile app with Odoo via REST API, managing tiles, banners, notifications, and user feedback.
onramp_simulator: Testing utility to send and debug messages to Compassion Onramps directly from a wizard interface.
partner_communication_reminder: Sends email reminders for contract actions to partners at configured intervals.
partner_salutation: Adds custom salutation field and partner title management for personalized partner communications.
rest_json_api: REST JSON request handler for mobile apps and APIs, supporting GET/POST JSON messaging with clean response format.
sponsorship_reporting: Financial reports for sponsorship data including evolution, terminations, new sponsorships, and accounting metrics.
theme_compassion_2025: Modern website theme with component library (colors, icons, pictograms) supporting the Compassion brand redesign.
website_remove_shop: Hides the default Odoo shop from website to disable e-commerce functionality.
account_invoice_split_invoice: Wizard to split an existing invoice into two separate invoices with split line items and amounts.
account_statement_completion: Auto-completion rules for bank statement imports, enabling automatic matching and field population.
child_compassion: Core child profile model with attributes, photos, holds, reservations, disabilities, hobbies, and Compassion mapping data for sponsored children.
crm_request: Customer support inbox system for handling emails and creating requests with routing, stages, and automated holiday responses.
gifts_payments: Payment processing and tracking for gifts to sponsored children via payment orders and order management.
mail_activity_to_crm_request: Conversion utility to turn mail activities into CRM requests with automatic sequencing.
muskathlon: Event registration and donation portal for a 4-discipline athletic fundraising race with participant tracking and material ordering.
partner_auto_match: Automated partner matching system using fuzzy logic to find existing contacts from any partner data input.
partner_communication_revision: Non-technical email template editing with revision workflows, validation, and preview for communication rules.
partner_search_fuzzy: Extends partner search with fuzzy matching on partner names and fields for flexible lookups.
sbc_compassion: Sponsor-to-child letter correspondence management with import/export, templates, barcode scanning, and delivery tracking.
sponsorship_sub_management: Tracks sponsorship state after child departure, managing substitute (SUB) sponsorship offers and rejections with kanban views.
theme_crowdfunding: Bootstrap-based website theme for crowdfunding campaigns.
website_sale_donation: Extends website shop with donation product type and mass mailing automation for donation tracking.
